ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append logged items to a target header in your daily note
ast.target: 将记录的项目附加到每日笔记中的目标标题下

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets a prefix for lines added via the log command
ast.target: 设置通过日志命令添加的行的前缀

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the log command will prefix newly added lines with a timestamp. (Changing this setting reloads the plugin.)
ast.target: 如果启用，日志命令将在新添加的行前加上时间戳。（更改此设置会重新加载插件。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, Lumberjack commands will always open in a new pane.
ast.target: 如果启用，Lumberjack 命令将始终在新窗格中打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the destination for notes created with `obsidian://timber`, e.g., `My Notes/Inbox`. Do not include leading or trailing slashes.
ast.target: 设置通过 `obsidian://timber` 创建的笔记的目标位置，例如 `My Notes/Inbox`。不要包含前导或尾随斜杠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the filename template for new drafts created with `obsidian://timber`. Uses Moment formatting, same as daily notes. Default: YYYYMMDDHHmm
ast.target: 设置通过 `obsidian://timber` 创建的新草稿的文件名模板。使用 Moment 格式，与每日笔记相同。默认：YYYYMMDDHHmm

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the format for timestamp prefixes. Follows Moment.js formatting, same as Obsidian's core daily notes.
ast.target: 设置时间戳前缀的格式。遵循 Moment.js 格式，与 Obsidian 的核心每日笔记相同。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Target header
ast.target: 目标标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Prefix for logging
ast.target: 日志前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Timestamp
ast.target: 时间戳

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Always open in a new pane
ast.target: 始终在新窗格中打开

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Inbox folder
ast.target: 收件箱文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Filename for new drafts
ast.target: 新草稿的文件名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Timestamp format
ast.target: 时间戳格式

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Prefix:
ast.target: 前缀：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取每日笔记模板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to create new file.
ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not find the daily note. Check your daily note settings, or report this as a bug on the plugin repository.
ast.target: 找不到每日笔记。请检查您的每日笔记设置，或在插件仓库中将此报告为错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error. Lumberjack couldn't create the draft. Does the inbox folder you've set in Preferences -> Lumberjack 🪓🪵 exist?
ast.target: 错误。Lumberjack 无法创建草稿。您在首选项 -> Lumberjack 🪓🪵 中设置的收件箱文件夹是否存在？

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't run the Timber command. Please report this as a bug in the GitHub repository for Lumberjack 🪓🪵
ast.target: 无法运行 Timber 命令。请在 Lumberjack 🪓🪵 的 GitHub 仓库中将此报告为错误。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Log something new on your daily note
ast.target: 在您的每日笔记上记录新内容

ast.name: text
ast.source: Lumberjack Settings
ast.target: Lumberjack 设置
